title: Splash Changer
description: FULLY customize the SPLASH in the title screen! Supports MiniMessage. Can also bring back 1.0 and 1.8 splashes!
body: # SplashChanger Adds an option to change Splash Text in Title Screen! With this mod you will be able to: - Use MiniMessage tags in your splashes - Use %name as a placeholder for **your** name - Have random custom splashes - Bring back old splashes from 1.0 and 1.8 versions of Minecraft - Completely hide splashes for a clean look ## FAQ: ### Q: I disabled config button, how do I enable it again? - Hover around the splash in the title screen and click to open the config! Alternative: You can download [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu), but if you don't want to, follow these steps: 1. Locate and open `.minecraft` folder on your computer (often found doing `WIN + R` and typing in `%APPDATA%`) 2. Find `config` folder and open it 3. Locate and open `splashchanger.json` file 4. Replace `"disableButton": true` with `"disableButton": false` 5. Save the file and restart minecraft!
